sagemath 安装图片：
<img width="1459" height="234" alt="image" src="https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/3e3378b9-92c1-4f58-b04c-48b739c228a5" />

# RSA 加密算法

RSA 是一种非对称加密算法，其可靠性由极大整数因式分解的难度决定。

## 公钥与私钥

随机取两个不同的大**质数** $p$ 和 $q$，计算 $N = p \times q$。  
根据欧拉函数求得 $\varphi(N) = \varphi(p) \varphi(q) = (p - 1) \times (q - 1)$  
选择一个小于 $\varphi(N)$ 且与 $\varphi(N)$ 互质的整数 $e$，求得 $e$ 关于 $\varphi(N)$ 的模反 $d$，使得 $ed = 1 \pmod {\varphi(N)}$  
将 $p$ 与 $q$ 的记录销毁  
此时 $\left( N, e \right)$ 是公钥，$\left(N, d\right)$ 是私钥。  

## 消息加密与解密

将消息以双方约定好的格式转化为一个小于 $N$，且与 $N$ 互质的整数 $m$，如果消息太长，则把消息分成几段（块加密），之后对于每一部分采用 $m^{e} \equiv c \pmod {N}$ 进行加密，解密用密钥 $d$，$c^{d} \equiv m \pmod {N}$ 进行解密。  

```py
from Crypto.Util.number import *
from secrets import randbits

p = getPrime(512)
q = getPrime(512)

n = p * q
e = 65537

m = bytes_to_long(flag)
c = pow(m, e, n)

print("p =", p)
print("q =", q)
print("e =", e)
print("c =", c)
'''
p = 7833526559350210716763736624276871338973265302039384005037668270722459749111510212645578582715412039060908556429504391788904499303021963918033838457712021
q = 11274522482114648167653425707657117942167215969612324249057858493398092816663094339833695146914712716091767834292452373966791325922322967827879446489910963
e = 65537
c = 
'''
```

思路：
`getPrime()` 函数是随机取一个质数，`getPrime(512)` 是生成一个 512 位的质数。  
$p$ 与 $q$ 是两个大质数，$n = p \times q$，通过 `print(isPrime(e))` 函数确定 $e$ 也是质数，$e$ 与 $\varphi(n)$ 互质，$m$ 是由 FLAG 字符串转化来的数字，$m^{e} \equiv c \pmod {n}$，寻找 $d$ 即可通过 $c^{d} \equiv m \pmod {n}$，而 $ed \equiv 1 \pmod \varphi(n)$，通过求 $e$ 关于 $\varphi{n}$ 的逆元即可，最后 $m = c ^ {d} \pmod {n}$，在通过 `long_to_bytes()` 函数转化回字符串得到 FLAG。  

```py
import gmpy2

p = 7833526559350210716763736624276871338973265302039384005037668270722459749111510212645578582715412039060908556429504391788904499303021963918033838457712021
q = 11274522482114648167653425707657117942167215969612324249057858493398092816663094339833695146914712716091767834292452373966791325922322967827879446489910963
e = 65537
c = 

print(isPrime(e))

n = p * q
phi_n=(p - 1) * (q - 1)

d = gmpy2.invert(e, phi_n)
m = pow(c, d, n)
print(long_to_bytes(m))
```

输出：

```text
True
b'flag{W31c0m3_T0_Crypt0}'
```

FLAG:flag{W31c0m3_T0_Crypt0}.

```py
from Crypto.Util.number import *

p = getPrime(512)
q = getPrime(512)

n = p * q

m = bytes_to_long(flag)

c = pow(m, e, n)

phi = (p - 1) * (q - 1)
d = inverse(e, phi)

dp = d % (p - 1)
dq = d % (q - 1)

print("p =", p)
print("q =", q)
print("dp =", dp)
print("dq =", dq)
print("c =", c)
'''
p = 7815414185491141116816659592648655093824828684096724566017773298150863675227130435782645950134326106977982747903113904523205447790009729530724322503221833
q = 9989016009119164140172559452397593815416653032520645020530362343604703571290641132626496035194681031089349635895258123948622879868985300264027551088746747
dp = 4010681140217557380422935065992638785960856284290416720391683347779267392850433355451759290094414691393922757792964689212573746434435619933431808206484225
dq = 2650091114188243387783699150080671432452650354401886796343461099352350290584408461982954461814393687345324352950407449243857759926179828428073409383707519
c = 
'''
```

思路：从代码中可以看到，$d = k_1 \times (p - 1) + dp = k_2 \times (q - 1)$，求出 $d$ 即可通过 $c^{d} \equiv m \pmod n$ 来得出 FLAG，而 $d$ 的求解可以用中国剩余定理来解决，这里使用 sagemath 的 `crt()` 函数来求解 $d$。

```py
import gmpy2
from Crypto.Util.number import *
from secrets import randbits

p = 7815414185491141116816659592648655093824828684096724566017773298150863675227130435782645950134326106977982747903113904523205447790009729530724322503221833
q = 9989016009119164140172559452397593815416653032520645020530362343604703571290641132626496035194681031089349635895258123948622879868985300264027551088746747
dp = 4010681140217557380422935065992638785960856284290416720391683347779267392850433355451759290094414691393922757792964689212573746434435619933431808206484225
dq = 2650091114188243387783699150080671432452650354401886796343461099352350290584408461982954461814393687345324352950407449243857759926179828428073409383707519
c = 

re = [dp, dq]
mo = [p - 1, q - 1]
d = crt(re, mo)
print(d)
m = pow(c, d, p * q)
f = long_to_bytes(m)
print(f)
```

输出：
```text
True
b'flag{W31c0m3_T0_Crypt0}'
```

FLAG:flag{W31c0m3_T0_Crypt0}

目前做了这些，后面再补充
